post.description:
Request opening
Request the opening of a new account

- **write_accounts_opening_request**

parameters.name: idempotency_key
parameters.description: Idempotency key to ensure unique processing

List all accounts

Required permission:
- **read_accounts_list**

post.description:

CrystalBank__Domains__Accounts__Api__Res.description: Response to an account opening request

has_more.description: Indicator if there are more entries

limit.description: Number of entries in the response

user_id.description: User id the api-key should be associated with

secret.description: Secret of the api-key (only displayed once on creation)

has_more.description: Indicator if there are more entries

limit.description: Number of entries in the response

created_at.description: Timestamp of the generation of the api-key

revoked_at.description: Timestamp of the revocation of the api-key

grant_type.description: Grant type of the token request, always 'client_credentials'

status.description: Current status of the approval process

has_more.description: Indicator if there are more entries

limit.description: Number of entries in the response

requestor_id.description: ID of the user who initiated the request

user_id.description: ID of the user who approved

permissions.description: Permissions the user is eligible to satisfy

completed.description: Whether the approval process is completed

name.description: Name of the customer. Needs to be at least 2 characters long

CrystalBank__Domains__Customers__Api__Re.description: Response to a customer onboarding request

has_more.description: Indicator if there are more entries

limit.description: Number of entries in the response

CrystalBank__Domains__Roles__Api__Respon.description: Response to an role creation request

has_more.description: Indicator if there are more entries

limit.description: Number of entries in the response

scopes.description: Scope the role has access to

CrystalBank__Domains__Scopes__Api__Respo.description: Response to an scope creation request

has_more.description: Indicator if there are more entries

limit.description: Number of entries in the response

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all entries in this movement

entries.description: List of ledger entries (minimum 2). Debits and credits must balance.

direction.description: Direction of the entry: DEBIT or CREDIT

amount.description: Amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents)

entry_type.description: Entry type: PRINCIPAL, SETTLEMENT, or TRANSACTION_FEE

channel.description: Channel through which the transaction was initiated

id.description: ID of the created ledger transaction

has_more.description: Indicator if there are more entries

limit.description: Number of entries in the response

id.description: ID of the transaction this posting belongs to

direction.description: Direction of the posting (DEBIT or CREDIT)

amount.description: Amount of the posting in minor currency units

CrystalBank__Domains__Users__Api__Respon.description: Response to an user onboarding request

role_ids.description: UUID of the roles to be assigned to the user

has_more.description: Indicator if there are more entries

limit.description: Number of entries in the response
